product: Genie Code Chat/Agent mode selector removed ​
tagline: June 29, 2026 The Chat/Agent mode selector has been removed from the Genie Code pane.
what_it_does: June 29, 2026 The Chat/Agent mode selector has been removed from the Genie Code pane. Genie Code now runs exclusively in Agent mode.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
